languages.text: "Я дарую тебе прощение. Иокаста, отведи ее на родную палубу и отпусти".
"I grant you forgiveness. Sauerback, take her back to the deck she came from and let her go."
languages.original_text: "Я дарую тебе прощение. Иокаста, отведи ее на родную палубу и отпусти".

traits.locale_text: "I grant you forgiveness. Sauerback, take her back to the deck she came from and let her go."
"I grant you forgiveness. Sauerback, take her back to the deck she came from and let her go."
"I grant you forgiveness. Sauerback, take her back to the deck she came from and let her go."

languages.text: 「許しを与える。サウアーバック、彼女を連れてきた甲板に戻して、自由にしてくれ」
languages.original_text: "I grant you forgiveness. Sauerback, take her back to the deck she came from and let her go."

traits.locale_text: 「許しを与える。サウアーバック、彼女を連れてきた甲板に戻して、自由にしてくれ。」

languages.text: "Seni affediyorum. Sauerback, onu geldiği güverteye götür ve serbest bırak."
languages.original_text: "I grant you forgiveness. Sauerback, take her back to the deck she came from and let her go."

traits.locale_text: "Seni affediyorum. Sauerback, onu geldiği güverteye götür ve serbest bırak."

languages.text: «Le concedo el perdón. Sauerback, llévela a la cubierta de la que salió y déjela marchar».
languages.original_text: "I grant you forgiveness. Sauerback, take her back to the deck she came from and let her go."

traits.locale_text: «Le concedo el perdón. Sauerback, llévela a la cubierta de la que salió y déjela marchar».

languages.text: “我宽恕你。苏尔贝克，把她送回她原来的甲板，然后放人。”
languages.original_text: "I grant you forgiveness. Sauerback, take her back to the deck she came from and let her go."

traits.locale_text: “我宽恕你。苏尔贝克，把她送回她原来的甲板，然后放人。”

languages.text: « Je vous accorde mon pardon. Sauerback, reconduisez-la sur le pont d'où elle vient et laissez-la partir. »
languages.original_text: "I grant you forgiveness. Sauerback, take her back to the deck she came from and let her go."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous accorde mon pardon. Sauerback, reconduisez-la sur le pont d'où elle vient et laissez-la partir. »

languages.text: "Ich gewähre Euch Vergebung. Sauerback, bringt sie auf ihr Deck zurück und lasst sie gehen."
languages.original_text: "I grant you forgiveness. Sauerback, take her back to the deck she came from and let her go."

traits.locale_text: "Ich gewähre Euch Vergebung. Sauerback, bringt sie auf ihr Deck zurück und lasst sie gehen."
